revision.comment: bypass Air Force redirect per [[WP:NOTBROKEN]] + per edit request on talk page - update army and navy flags
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Venezuela | flag alias = Flag of Venezuela.svg | flag alias-1810 = Flag of the First Republic of Venezuela.svg | flag alias-1813 = Bandera de la Guerra a Muerte.svg | flag alias-1817 = Bandera de Angostura (20 de noviembre de 1817).svg | flag alias-1830 = Flag of Venezuela (1830-1836).svg | flag alias-1836 = Flag of Venezuela (1836–1859).svg | flag alias-1859 = Flag of Venezuela (1859–1863).svg | flag alias-1863 = Flag of Venezuela (1863–1905).svg | flag alias-1905 = Flag of Venezuela (1905–1930).svg | flag alias-1930 = Flag of Venezuela (1930–1954).svg | flag alias-1954 = Flag of Venezuela (1954–2006).svg | flag alias-army=Flag of the Bolivarian Army (Venezuela).svg | link alias-army= Venezuelan Army | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Venezuelan Air Force.svg | link alias-air force = Venezuelan Air Force | flag alias-naval = Flag of Venezuela (state).svg | link alias-naval = Bolivarian Navy of Venezuela | flag alias-navy = Flag of the Bolivarian Navy of Venezuela.svg | link alias-navy = Bolivarian Navy of Venezuela | flag alias-football = Flag of Venezuela (state).svg | flag alias-beach soccer = Flag of Venezuela (state).svg | flag alias-futsal = Flag of Venezuela (state).svg | flag alias-state = Flag of Venezuela (state).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1810 | var2 = 1813 | var3 = 1817 | var4 = 1830 | var5 = 1836 | var6 = 1859 | var7 = 1863 | var8 = 1905 | var9 = 1930 | var10 = 1954 | var11 = state | redir1 = VEN </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Venezuela | flag alias = Flag of Venezuela.svg | flag alias-1810 = Flag of the First Republic of Venezuela.svg | flag alias-1813 = Bandera de la Guerra a Muerte.svg | flag alias-1817 = Bandera de Angostura (20 de noviembre de 1817).svg | flag alias-1830 = Flag of Venezuela (1830-1836).svg | flag alias-1836 = Flag of Venezuela (1836–1859).svg | flag alias-1859 = Flag of Venezuela (1859–1863).svg | flag alias-1863 = Flag of Venezuela (1863–1905).svg | flag alias-1905 = Flag of Venezuela (1905–1930).svg | flag alias-1930 = Flag of Venezuela (1930–1954).svg | flag alias-1954 = Flag of Venezuela (1954–2006).svg | flag alias-army=Flag of the Bolivarian Army (Venezuela).svg | link alias-army= Venezuelan Army | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Venezuelan Air Force.svg | link alias-air force = Venezuelan Air Force | flag alias-naval = Flag of Venezuela (state).svg | link alias-naval = Bolivarian Navy of Venezuela | flag alias-navy = Flag of the Bolivarian Navy of Venezuela.svg | link alias-navy = Bolivarian Navy of Venezuela | flag alias-football = Flag of Venezuela (state).svg | flag alias-beach soccer = Flag of Venezuela (state).svg | flag alias-futsal = Flag of Venezuela (state).svg | flag alias-state = Flag of Venezuela (state).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1810 | var2 = 1813 | var3 = 1817 | var4 = 1830 | var5 = 1836 | var6 = 1859 | var7 = 1863 | var8 = 1905 | var9 = 1930 | var10 = 1954 | var11 = state | redir1 = VEN </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Venezuela here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Venezuela for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Venezuela | flag alias = Flag of Venezuela.svg | flag alias-1810 = Flag of the First Republic of Venezuela.svg | flag alias-1813 = Bandera de la Guerra a Muerte.svg | flag alias-1817 = Bandera de Angostura (20 de noviembre de 1817).svg | flag alias-1830 = Flag of Venezuela (1830-1836).svg | flag alias-1836 = Flag of Venezuela (1836–1859).svg | flag alias-1859 = Flag of Venezuela (1859–1863).svg | flag alias-1863 = Flag of Venezuela (1863–1905).svg | flag alias-1905 = Flag of Venezuela (1905–1930).svg | flag alias-1930 = Flag of Venezuela (1930–1954).svg | flag alias-1954 = Flag of Venezuela (1954–2006).svg | flag alias-army=Flag of the Bolivarian Army (Venezuela).svg | link alias-army= Venezuelan Army | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Venezuelan Air Force.svg | link alias-air force = Venezuelan Air Force | flag alias-naval = Flag of Venezuela (state).svg | link alias-naval = Bolivarian Navy of Venezuela | flag alias-navy = Flag of the Bolivarian Navy of Venezuela.svg | link alias-navy = Bolivarian Navy of Venezuela | flag alias-football = Flag of Venezuela (state).svg | flag alias-beach soccer = Flag of Venezuela (state).svg | flag alias-futsal = Flag of Venezuela (state).svg | flag alias-state = Flag of Venezuela (state).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1810 | var2 = 1813 | var3 = 1817 | var4 = 1830 | var5 = 1836 | var6 = 1859 | var7 = 1863 | var8 = 1905 | var9 = 1930 | var10 = 1954 | var11 = state | redir1 = VEN </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
